zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley於大約1217年出生時，他的父親Sir Walter William de Baskerville9歲，母親Susannah Crigdon4歲。他於大約1253年與Sybil Corbet在英國賀福爾易亞迪斯利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1297年在英國英格蘭賀福爾可姆享年82歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾金頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley于大约1217年出生时，他的父亲Sir Walter William de Baskerville9岁，母亲Susannah Crigdon4岁。他于大约1253年与Sybil Corbet在英国賀福爾易亞迪斯利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1297年在英国英格兰賀福爾可姆享年82岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾金頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Baskerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Boscherville in Eure, France, named with Old Anglo-Norman French boschet ‘copse, thicket’ (a diminutive of Bois ) + ville ‘settlement, town’.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley was born about 1217, his father, Sir Walter William de Baskerville, was 9 and his mother, Susannah Crigdon, was 4. He married Sybil Corbet about 1253, in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1297, in Combe, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82, and was buried in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley est né environ 1217, son père, Sir Walter William de Baskerville, avait 9 ans et sa mère, Susannah Crigdon, avait 4 ans. Il a épousé Sybil Corbet environ 1253, à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1297, à Combe, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Kington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley um 1217 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter William de Baskerville 9 und seine Mutter Susannah Crigdon 4. Er hat um 1253 in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England Sybil Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1297 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Combe, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley è nato il circa 1217, il suo padre, Sir Walter William de Baskerville, aveva 9 anni e il suo madre, Susannah Crigdon, aveva 4 anni. Lui sposato Sybil Corbet circa 1253, nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1297, nel Combe, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Kington, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisleyが約1217年に生まれた時，父Sir Walter William de Baskervilleは9歳，母Susannah Crigdonは4歳であった。約1253年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーでSybil Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1297年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアコンベで82歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley(이)가 대략 1217년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter William de Baskerville(은)는 9세였고, 그의 어머니 Susannah Crigdon(은)는 4세였다. 그는 대략 1253년 영국 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 Sybil Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1297년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 코브에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 킨그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley nasceu aproximadamente 1217, seu pai, Sir Walter William de Baskerville, tinha 9 anos e sua mãe, Susannah Crigdon, tinha 4 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil Corbet aproximadamente 1253, em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1297, em Combe, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley родился около 1217 г., его отцу по имени Sir Walter William de Baskerville было 9 лет, а матери, которую звали Susannah Crigdon, 4. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil Corbet около 1253 г. в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1297 г. в местности комб, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности кингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley nació aproximadamente 1217, su papá, Sir Walter William de Baskerville, tenía 9 años y su mamá, Susannah Crigdon, tenía 4 años. Se casó con Sybil Corbet aproximadamente 1253, en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1297, en Combe, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
